hooks.command: CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; if [ ! -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" ]; then echo "Claude hook router launcher not found under $CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT" >&2; exit 1; fi; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml" claude hook pre-tool-use --repo-root "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT"

CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; if [ ! -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" ]; then echo "Claude hook router launcher not found under $CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT" >&2; exit 1; fi; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml" claude hook user-prompt-submit --repo-root "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT"

CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; if [ ! -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" ]; then echo "Claude hook router launcher not found under $CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT" >&2; exit 1; fi; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml" claude hook post-tool-use --repo-root "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT"

CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; if [ ! -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" ]; then echo "Claude hook router launcher not found under $CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT" >&2; exit 1; fi; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml" claude hook stop --repo-root "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT"
